skills.name: Blood Ward
skills.description: When Countess Mariath is deployed in Scarlet Blood Form, grants M. DMG Immunity to other Demon Soldiers in range for 3 sec. Demon Soldiers with the Mark of Bloodspring skill have this effect extended to 6 sec. When Countess Mariath is deployed in Azure Blood Form, grants P. DMG Immunity to other Demon Soldiers in range for 3 sec. Demon Soldiers with the Mark of Bloodspring skill have this effect extended to 6 sec.

skills.name: Dual Lifeblood
skills.description: When Countess Mariath is deployed in Scarlet Blood Form, significantly reduces M. DMG taken. When Countess Mariath dies, grants 35% M. DMG Reduction to all Demon Soldiers on the field for 10 sec. When Countess Mariath is deployed in Azure Blood Form, significantly reduces P. DMG taken. When Countess Mariath dies, grants 35% P. DMG Reduction to all Demon Soldiers on the field for 10 sec.

skills.name: Control Immunity
skills.description: Immune to all CC Effects (except Slow).

skills.name: Mark of Bloodspring III
skills.description: A Bloodspring lord. Increases own Received Healing Multiplier by 15% and restores HP equal to 7% Max HP with each Basic ATK.

skills.name: Bestowal
skills.description: When Countess Mariath dies, restores HP to all other Demon Soldiers on the field equal to 40% of the target's Max HP.

skills.name: RES Enhancement
skills.description: P. DMG Reduction and M. DMG Reduction +15%.
